title: Catherine Lansfield Sleep Dreams Reversible Single Duvet Cover Set with Pillowcase Blush Pink
features: Catherine Lansfield is renowned for style and quality - designed and developed in Great Britain.
Blush pink and grey printed quotes duvet set with a matching blush pink reverse.
Single Duvet Set -135x200cm 1 50x75 Pillowcase. Made from soft and comfortable easy care 52% Polyester 48% Cotton fabric, requires minimal ironing. Wash at 30 Degrees.
This duvet set is fully reversible with a button fastening.
Ethically sourced overseas and made to strict quality and human-ecological safety standards, in accordance with STANDARD 100 by OEKO-TEX.
